name: Lite Fruit Whip
recipeIngredient: 1 package Orange-flavored Gelatin or Lemon-flavored (3 oz pk)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine the reserved fruit liquid and 1/2 cup orange juice; heat to boiling.
2. Add gelatin and dissolve completely. Stir in the remaining orange juice, lemon peel, lemon juice, and vanilla. Chill until partially set (60 to 70 minutes).
3. Add egg whites; beat with an electric mixer until doubled in size and creamy (5 to 7 minutes).
4. In a serving bowl, spread half of the fruit cocktail.
5. Top with gelatin mixture; chill until firm.
6. Top with remaining fruit and serve.
